items.title: Italy set to name World Cup legend, 47, as new manager after being snubbed by Pep Guardiola
items.summary: ANDREA PIRLO has reportedly agreed to become Italy's new boss - after Pep Guardiola's brutal snub. The Spaniard, 55, had been pinpointed as the four-time World Cup winners' top target to replace Gennaro Gattuso. items.title: Man Utd fans say ‘it’s a sign to buy Baleba’ as Seagulls cause chaos on MUTV broadcast of Rosenborg friendly
items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED fans thought they saw a sign from up above during a broadcast of the club's friendly with Rosenberg.
